name: resilient-otel-e2e-nestjs
description: End-to-end tests consuming resilient-otel published on npm from a NestJS app. Boots the SDK against a real OpenTelemetry Collector and asserts spans/logs arrive with PII/secrets redacted before export.

scripts.test:e2e:full: pnpm collector:up && pnpm build && pnpm test:e2e; code=$?; pnpm collector:down; exit $code
